---
title: "Portfolio"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-text}
# Computational Biology Portfolio

Quarto-powered landing page for projects, reports, and reproducible analyses.

This site links out to source repositories and published HTML outputs.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Browse Projects](projects.qmd){.cta-btn .cta-primary}
[GitHub Profile](https://github.com/mirramockakid){.cta-btn .cta-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-panel}
## Focus

- Statistical genomics
- Reproducible analysis workflows
- Simulation studies and reporting

## Stack

R, Quarto, R Markdown, GitHub Pages
:::
:::

## Featured Project

::: {.project-card}
### GSEA Permutation vs. Rotation

Simulation of GSEA results under the null hypothesis of no association between gene sets and phenotypes, comparing permutation and rotation methods.

::: {.link-row}
[Source code](https://github.com/mirramockakid/GSEA-Permutation-vs.-Rotation){.chip-link}
[Analysis report](https://mirramockakid.github.io/GSEA-Permutation-vs.-Rotation/gsea_rotation_vs_permutation.html){.chip-link}
:::
:::

## Add More Projects

Use `projects.qmd` as the directory page for all repositories and rendered outputs.
